votes.rationale: motion-0116 closes the third and final member of the self-unratified closure anomaly family identified by motion-0111. motion-0094 now has the full 9-artifact canonical set: vote.json (PASS, 3 yes), verify.json (all_required_ok: true), policy.yaml (risk_score 0.02), decision.yaml (status: RATIFIED), and decision.md (RATIFIED header). Both required gates pass EXIT 0. The repair is clean, bounded to motion-0094 only, and motion-0093 was not modified.

The repair evidence is inspectable: motion-0094/decision.yaml shows status: RATIFIED and ratified_by: unanimous_consent. All three missing artifacts (vote.json, verify.json, policy.yaml) are present with correct structure. No downstream motion was modified. The challenge.md for motion-0094 had one resolved objection (C-1, Accepted). The P2 anomaly family is complete: 0083 closed by motion-0113, 0092 closed by motion-0114, 0094 closed by motion-0116.

The self-unratified closure anomaly family identified in the motion-0111 corpus audit is now fully resolved. All three members have complete 9-artifact governance records. motion-0116 is well-scoped, the implementation is verified, and the gates pass. Ratification is appropriate.
